sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98239" key="sumballomaxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμβαλλο-μᾰχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n98239.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">concinnatio</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
